---
title: "transformer-hp-sweep-740 — analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# transformer-hp-sweep-740

Placeholder. Notebook gets filled in after the full 60-trial sweep
completes — main agent will read `metrics.json`, plot the val_auc
distribution by completed trial, the ASHA prune ratio, and the top-3
retrained models' learning curves from `results/trial_*_history.json`.
